Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value:
Warning: Disabling Dynamic Global Illumination may result in instances of inconsistent interior lighting, harsh lighting transitions, or certain areas appearing much brighter or darker than intended.

While keeping this feature enabled is recommended for the optimal experience, disabling it may improve performance.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: Setting the memory limit to Local Platform will let you create more objects but may cause crashes or instability when trying to play on lower end hardware.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: Setting the memory limit to No Limit will let you create more objects but may cause crashes or instability when too many objects are added.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value:
Choose the quality level for NVIDIA's Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) upscaling.

Higher quality settings render the game at a resolution closer to native, offering better visual fidelity but with a potential performance impact.

Lower settings increase performance by rendering at a lower base resolution.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value:
Improve performance by rendering the game at a lower resolution and upscaling it to match your display. The techniques available may depend the system's hardware.

The enhanced image quality will maintain a smoother frame rate, but may introduce minor visual artifacts.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A fleck of oxidization found mostly on <GlobalColor.Attention>metal</> that's exposed to the elements.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A dreadful helm crafted with the grim visage of <GlobalColor.Attention>Axl</>, the fallen tarantula.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A rugged vest with a dreadful presence, fit to command the greatest arachnids.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A dreadful pair of shin kickers to keep your foes in line.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: An exquisite trophy harvested from <GlobalColor.Attention>Axl</>, the fuzziest arachnid to ever roam the park.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A broad spear forged from one of <GlobalColor.Attention>Axl's</> great talons. It oozes fresh <GlobalColor.Attention>venom</> with every strike.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A massive greatbow crafted from the dreadful fangs of <GlobalColor.Attention>Axl</>, the fallen tarantula.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: An arrow made from <GlobalColor.Attention>northern scorpion</> chitin. Requires a <GlobalColor.Attention>greatbow</> to fire.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A barbed great arrow dunked in <GlobalColor.Attention>scorpion venom</>.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A crispy golden chunk of a Get N' Jet Corn Hog, deep fried to perfection.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A chewy snack with a salty crunchy exterior.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A compact <GlobalColor.Attention>mosquito blood sack</> wrapped tightly on the tip of an arrow. Showers the target with a healing splash of filtered blood jelly.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A forest enclosure which is the site of an ongoing military action. The soldiers are frozen in place, as there is no child remaining to animate them to victory or defeat.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A pure sample of <GlobalColor.Attention>Axl's </> venom. The tiniest drop can coat weapons to deadly effect.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: Knock dew drops off of grass blades and drink them, or craft and fill a Canteen to carry water with you.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: To fill your hungry belly, cook Raw Meat at a Roasting Spit or cook Meals with the Cookery.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A Gas Mask crafted from Weevil parts will protect you from Poison gas.

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: You can equip a torch from your hotpouch while riding a Buggy to light the way!

Value.Value: A festive tree to help your little home feel merry and bright. Mysteriously, each December morning a small gift may appear beneath it. Who could be leaving them?

Value.Value: Send a festive firework into the air.

Value.Name: DefaultText

Value.Name: DefaultText

Value.Name: DefaultText
Value.Value: A monstrous chest to hoard your treasures. Stores 60 items.
